title: トレーニングは理論的に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I visit the gym to find Biwa Hayahide, Winning
Ticket, and Narita Taishin all there.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Professor Hayahideeee! You gotta help
meee!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the matter, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I tried reading the training books you brought
over, but they're all gibberish to me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Says here, um, ki... kinetic strength is needed for
acceleration? And apparently, I have to do
kinetic training or something like that?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's all that mean? Is it some kind of spell?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's not a spell—it's theory. I suppose I should
elucidate the text for you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Think of kinetic muscular strength as an
explosion—the ability to explode with power in a
single moment.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now how does one foster such power? One must
train their fast-twitch muscles.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Fast-twitch muscles generally refer to external or
"outer" muscles. Training them can lead to
enhanced explosive power.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And how does one train their fast-twitch muscles?
Through kinetic training. Strength training is a
prime example of this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my explanation. I believe I was
logical and to the point, but did you comprehend
it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, I'm so LOST! My head's spinning like
crazy!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, it'd be quicker if I gave you a clear
demonstration...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes. I know just the thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: See that barbell over there, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? That heavy-looking thing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's the one. It weighs approximately 200
kilograms.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Most wouldn't be able to lift that without solid
muscle strength. However...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Given my daily weight training sessions and
following the book's logic, I should be able to lift
it with ease.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because, as I've previously explained, logic is
absolute.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, really?! Wow, that's some impressive stuff!
Show me, show me! Pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Watch closely and behold the
effectiveness of logic-based training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, you sure about that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I shall gradually lower my hips from my
starting position.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, watch... You see how my thighs and calves
form a perfect ninety-degree angle?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As long as I... maintain this for... five seconds!
Then!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: One... two... three!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Theoretically speaking... failure is
impossible!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wheeze... See? Perfectly executed! The logic was flawless!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! That was amazing! Your logic power is
awesooome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give that theory thingy a shot! I'll train
enough to lift a 100-kilogram barbell!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it pleases me that you have come to
understand the importance of theory. Let's
continue to support each other in our endeavors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Theory? Logic? Wasn't that just all muscle?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gnaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Urk... I disappoint myself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, looks like your logicy-ness didn't work
out...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No! Failure is theoretically impossible! The logic is
flawless!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I shall lift this barbell at all costs! The theory must
be demonstrated in full!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I'm pretty sure this isn't about logic and
more about pure muscle...
